prompt_text: Open source or affordable CRM tools instead of Attio
response:
# Open Source & Affordable CRM Alternatives to Attio

## **Free/Open Source**

| Tool | Best For | Key Features |
|------|----------|--------------|
| **Odoo** | Small-medium businesses | Modular, accounting integrated, self-hostable |
| **Frappe/ERPNext** | Tech-savvy teams | Highly customizable, open source, free self-hosted |
| **Mautic** | Marketing-focused | Marketing automation + CRM, open source |
| **EspoCRM** | Lightweight needs | Simple UI, open source, good customization |

## **Affordable/Freemium (Under $100/month)**

| Tool | Price | Strengths |
|------|-------|-----------|
| **HubSpot** | Free tier + $50+ | Most complete free option, great for growth |
| **Keap (Infusionsoft)** | $79+ | Small business automation |
| **Pipedrive** | $14-99/user | Sales-focused, simple pipeline |
| **Zoho CRM** | Free-$65/user | Most affordable paid option, good integrations |
| **Brevo (Sendinblue)** | Free-$99 | Email + CRM bundle, generous free tier |
| **Nutshell** | $19-99/user | Lightweight, intuitive |

## **Best Budget Picks by Use Case**

- **Lean startups**: HubSpot Free or Zoho CRM Free
- **Sales teams**: Pipedrive
- **Self-hosted control**: Odoo or ERPNext
- **All-in-one**: Zoho CRM Suite
- **Marketing-heavy**: Mautic (open source) or Brevo

**What's your main priority?** (sales, marketing, team size, budget) Happy to narrow it down further.
